title: Conversational Handoffs
concept: Implementing clean protocols for one agent to transfer task control and context state to another.

exercises.prompt: What is a way that agents can manage messages from each other?

options.text: By using a queue to process messages one at a time.
By responding immediately without considering the queue.

exercises.explain: Using a queue allows agents to process messages in order, ensuring no information is missed.

cards.title: What are Conversational Handoffs?
cards.body: Conversational handoffs are when one agent transfers control of a task to another agent while keeping track of the context.

cards.title: Definition of Conversational Handoffs
cards.body: Conversational handoffs refer to the process where one AI agent passes the task and relevant information to another agent smoothly and seamlessly.

cards.title: Like a Relay Race
cards.body: Imagine a relay race: one runner hands off a baton to the next. It's vital to pass it smoothly, otherwise the team loses time. Handoffs in conversation work the same way!

cards.title: Example of a Handoff
cards.body: If Agent A handles a customer query but needs to pass it to Agent B, Agent A shares all details so Agent B can continue without interruption.

cards.title: Myth: Handoffs are always complicated
cards.body: Some think handoffs must be complex, but simple, clear protocols make them easy and efficient!

cards.title: Handoffs in Action
cards.body: Look at how agents communicate during handoffs.

left.text: Agent A stops and prepares to hand off.

right.text: Agent B receives information and continues.

exercises.prompt: What is the main benefit of a conversational handoff?

options.text: To make conversations longer than needed.
To keep context clear and tasks moving forward.
To limit agent communication to only one agent.

exercises.explain: The main benefit is that it helps maintain clarity and efficiency, ensuring tasks progress smoothly.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Handoffs should happen without any information being shared between agents.
exercises.explain: False! Information must be shared to ensure continuity and understanding.

exercises.prompt: A conversational handoff ensures that one agent _______ the task to another while sharing context.
exercises.sentence: A conversational handoff ensures that one agent transfers the task to another while sharing context.
exercises.explain: The correct word is "transfers", as it describes the action of passing control from one agent to another.

exercises.prompt: Which statement best describes a successful conversational handoff?

options.text: Agent B has no idea what Agent A was doing.
Agent A shares all necessary context before stopping.
Agent A ignores messages to save time.

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that Agent A shares all context, which ensures Agent B can pick up right where Agent A left off.

exercises.prompt: Why is it important for agents to implement clean protocols during handoffs?

options.text: To confuse the user and create suspense.
To ensure all relevant information is communicated effectively.
To reduce the number of agents involved in tasks.
To allow agents to work independently without rules.

exercises.explain: The correct answer emphasizes the importance of effective communication. Clean protocols help ensure that agents understand what has been done so they can continue smoothly.
